ksa_text: Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques, including data cleansing, standardization, deduplication, enrichment, imputation approaches, and quality improvement workflows for addressing identified data issues.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.41) to justify inclusion for the Chief Data Scientist. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Chief Data Scientist roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for Chief Data Scientist. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Chief Data Scientist competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.41) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Chief Data Scientist. All passes support exclusion.
